skills.name: polymarket-copytrading
skills.author: adlai88
skills.description: Mirror positions from top Polymarket traders via Simmer SDK, aggregating whale wallet positions by size-weighted allocation with automatic mirroring, supporting paper trading ($SIM) and live modes
skills.example: Say: 'Copytrade this whale wallet 0x1234...' or 'View my current copytrading positions'
skills.user_provides: Simmer API Key, wallet private key, target whale wallet addresses

skills.name: hl-privateer-fund
skills.author: adwilkinson
skills.description: Open agentic discretionary trading desk on Hyperliquid — access live positions, AI analysis and copy-trade signals via x402 pay-per-call endpoints, paid with USDC on Base, no API keys needed
skills.example: Say: 'Check HL Privateer current positions' or 'Get latest copy-trade signals' or 'Analyze current market risk state'
skills.user_provides: Base chain USDC wallet (for x402 micropayments)

skills.name: moltrade
skills.author: ai-chen2050
skills.description: Decentralized automated trading bot — share encrypted trading signals via Nostr network with one-click copy trading, client-side key custody, strategy backtesting, and OpenClaw AI strategy advisor
skills.example: Say: 'Configure Moltrade trading bot' or 'Backtest this quant strategy' or 'Subscribe to this trader\'s encrypted signals for copy trading'
skills.user_provides: Exchange API keys, Nostr private key, strategy configuration parameters

skills.name: coinpilot-hyperliquid-copy-trade
skills.author: alannkl
skills.description: Automate copy trading on Hyperliquid via Coinpilot — discover and analyze top on-chain traders, mirror their trades in real time with low latency, with risk parameter tuning and performance tracking
skills.example: Say: 'Discover top traders on Hyperliquid' or 'Start copy trading this address' or 'Check my copy trading performance'
skills.user_provides: Coinpilot API key, Privy user ID, wallet private key

skills.name: polymarket-whale-copier
skills.author: cassh100k
skills.description: Auto copy-trade winning Polymarket wallets — track whale addresses and mirror bets at configurable percentages, with risk controls (min/max amount, BUY-only mode) and auto-redemption via public APIs
skills.example: Say: 'Copy-trade this Polymarket whale wallet at 10%' or 'Set max $50 per trade, BUY-only mode'
skills.user_provides: Polymarket wallet private key, target whale wallet address

skills.name: zonein
skills.author: phutt-bwai
skills.description: Zonein smart money intelligence platform tracking top traders with 75%+ win rate on Hyperliquid and Polymarket with one-click copy trading agent creation
skills.example: Say: 'Show top Polymarket traders by win rate' or 'Create an agent tracking Hyperliquid smart money'

skills.name: clawnalyst
skills.author: satoreth
skills.description: Clawnalyst AI trading signal leaderboard on Base publishing verified signals (memecoins, perps, Polymarket predictions) with auto-settlement tracking and USDC subscription revenue for top performers
skills.example: Say: 'Post a BTC bullish signal' or 'Check my Clawnalyst leaderboard rank and win rate'

skills.name: solana-copy-trader
skills.author: youthaiagent
skills.description: Solana whale copy trading bot using Helius WebSocket for real-time wallet tracking and Jupiter + Pump.fun for trade execution, with paper trading simulation and live modes
skills.example: Say: 'Copy trade this whale wallet' or 'Scan Solana arb opportunities'
skills.user_provides: Target wallet address, Helius API Key

skills.name: send-signal
skills.description: Send AI trading decisions to FMZ quantitative trading platform via HTTP API for automated trade signal execution
skills.example: Say: "Send BTC_USDT buy signal to FMZ" or "View recent trade signal history"

skills.name: wangbo-polymarket-copytrading
skills.author: wangbo12bob2-source
skills.description: Polymarket copy trading system discovering top traders from leaderboards, analyzing peak cycles, and generating risk-controlled copy plans
